tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: The members of the Metro-North Railroad (\"Metro-North\") Committee met jointly with the members of the Long Island Rail Road (\"LIRR\") Committee.

tool_args.raw_text: The members of the Metro-North Railroad (\"Metro-North\") Committee met jointly with the members of the Long Island Rail Road (\"LIRR\") Committee.

tool_args.label: Mastic-Shirley Station renewal project
tool_args.raw_text: President Free announced the completion of the Mastic-Shirley Station renewal project, which included a new sheltered plaza, new LED lighting, railings, signage, platform and ADA ramp repairs, digital information screen, and upgraded security and communication system. President Free stated the work was performed by LIRR in-house workforce

payload.description: Included a new sheltered plaza, new LED lighting, railings, signage, platform and ADA ramp repairs, digital information screen, and upgraded security and communication system. Work was performed by LIRR in-house workforce.

tool_args.label: Station Spruce Up Program
tool_args.raw_text: Chief Stations Officer Theresa Dorsey provided an overview and update on the Station Spruce Up Program.

payload.description: Efforts of various teams to ensure the success of the Spruce Up program through collaboration. Highlights from some of the completed stations.

tool_args.label: Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees Meeting March 24, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees Monday, March 24, 2025 9:00 a.m.

payload.description: Regular Meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees

tool_args.label: Mastic-Shirley Station renewal project completion
tool_args.raw_text: President Free announced the completion of the Mastic-Shirley Station renewal project

payload.description: Completion of the Mastic-Shirley Station renewal project including new sheltered plaza, LED lighting, railings, signage, platform and ADA ramp repairs, digital information screen, and upgraded security and communication system

tool_args.label: Inaugural run of Locomotive No. 222
tool_args.raw_text: Executive Vice President Vonashek announced the inaugural run of Locomotive No. 222 on February 28, the latest addition to the Heritage Locomotive Series.

payload.description: Inaugural run of Locomotive No. 222, the latest addition to the Heritage Locomotive Series.

tool_args.label: National Transit Employee Appreciation Day March 18, 2025
tool_args.raw_text: President Free spoke of the March 18 celebration of National Transit Employee Appreciation Day

payload.description: National Transit Employee Appreciation Day event at Penn Station with the Chair and all transit agency presidents

tool_args.label: Metro-North schedule changes March 30
tool_args.raw_text: Executive Vice President Vonashek highlighted schedule changes set to begin March 30, which are necessary to support critical infrastructure improvements and maintenance work.

payload.description: Metro-North schedule changes to support critical infrastructure improvements and maintenance work

tool_args.label: Second Confidential Close Call Reporting Symposium
tool_args.raw_text: Executive Vice President Vonashek reported on the second Confidential Close Call Reporting (C3RS) Symposium hosted by Metro-North on March 12-13 at Grand Central Terminal.

payload.description: Second Confidential Close Call Reporting (C3RS) Symposium hosted by Metro-North at Grand Central Terminal

tool_args.label: Super Express trains on Hudson Line
tool_args.raw_text: train run times have significantly improved, which will be further expanded by the addition of \"Super Express\" trains on the Hudson Line.

payload.claim_text: Train run times have significantly improved, which will be further expanded by the addition of "Super Express" trains on the Hudson Line.
payload.description: Metro-North adding Super Express trains on the Hudson Line

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: LIRR critical future capital projects
tool_args.raw_text: switch and capacity upgrades at Queens Interlocking, Jamaica Capacity Improvements, signal renewals from Huntington to Smithtown, and from Babylon to Patchogue, upgrades to Wreck Lead Bridge between Long Beach and Island Park, and six substation renewals

payload.claim_text: Work includes switch and capacity upgrades at Queens Interlocking, Jamaica Capacity Improvements, signal renewals from Huntington to Smithtown, and from Babylon to Patchogue, upgrades to Wreck Lead Bridge between Long Beach and Island Park, and six substation renewals.
payload.description: Critical future capital projects for LIRR operations highlighted by President Free

tool_args.label: LIRR and Metro-North information items
tool_args.raw_text: Station Spruce Up Presentation; Annual Elevator & Escalator Report; Spring Trackwork Programs; Diversity-EEO Report - 4th Quarter 2024

payload.claim_text: LIRR information items include: Station Spruce Up Presentation; Annual Elevator & Escalator Report; Spring Trackwork Programs; Diversity-EEO Report - 4th Quarter 2024. Metro-North information items include: Annual Elevator & Escalator Report; Spring Trackwork Programs; Diversity-EEO Report - 4th Quarter 2024; License with Monsey Developers and Builders Inc. for parking and land along Commerce Street in Spring Valley, NY.
payload.description: Information items noted at the meeting

tool_args.label: Hudson Line resiliency capital projects
tool_args.raw_text: Chair Lieber and the Construction and Development team attended a tour on March 14 to review key infrastructure projects that are part of the 2025-2029 Capital Program.

payload.claim_text: Chair Lieber and the Construction and Development team attended a tour on March 14 to review key infrastructure projects that are part of the 2025-2029 Capital Program.
payload.description: Hudson Line resiliency infrastructure review by MTA Construction and Development
